channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bags of what looks like rubble dumped, 28th March
item.description:
The bags have been there for about 3 or 4 weeks. Dog walkers are now throwing bags of dog mess on top of the bags.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powerscroft Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Heavy metal box and piece of wood dumped along canal, 28th March
item.description:
By Barrowell Green entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barrowell Green, Southgate

item.title: Rubbish, 28th March
item.description:
The corner of Sherard Road and Well Hall has been a mess for ages. Mess encourages more mess. rubbish, over growing bundles and years of decaying leaf matter need cleaning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sherard Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
